entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A crop variety subject to impact assessment within the Groundnut Seed Project

entities.name: IMPACT ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of measuring the social and economic benefits of new agricultural technologies or research and development projects

entities.name: IGNRM
entities.description: Integrated genetic and natural resource management technologies

entities.name: GROUNDNUT SEED PROJECT
entities.description: A project focused on groundnut seeds, funded by the Common Fund for Commodities and implemented by ICRISAT

entities.name: CFC
entities.description: Common Fund for Commodities, the funding organization for the Groundnut Seed Project

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the organization implementing the Groundnut Seed Project

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the agricultural technologies are being assessed

entities.name: ECONOMIC SURPLUS METHOD
entities.description: A specific method used to measure the impact of agricultural research, known for being easy to use and requiring minimal data

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: The field of scientific study whose impact on society and economy is being measured

entities.name: ISRA
entities.description: Institut Sénégalais de Recherches Agricoles, an organization that shared experiences on impact assessment

entities.name: IER
entities.description: Institut d’Economie Rurale, an organization that shared experiences on impact assessment

entities.name: INRAN

entities.name: INERA
